title: Mobile Services toolkit
description: Locksmith / mobile key tools for Mainspring. Replace or extend with your full inventory — same shape: groups[].tools[], scenarios[] with required, nice_to_have, alternatives.

tools.name: Multi-brand key programmer (e.g. Autel / Xhorse class)
tools.notes: OBD or bench programming for transponder & smart keys.

tools.name: Secondary / backup programmer
tools.notes: Covers marques your primary tool does not.

tools.name: RF / proximity key tester
tools.notes: Quick check of fob output before deeper diagnosis.

tools.name: OEM-level or deep diagnostic scan tool
tools.notes: PIN pulls, module resets, immobiliser workflows.

tools.name: Organised chip & remote stock (ID433/7935/ASK, etc.)
tools.notes: On-van stock matching your common coverage.

tools.name: EEPROM read/write bench (IR/clip + adapters)
tools.notes: AKL and bruised-module recoveries where supported.

tools.name: Lishi-style or equivalent decode picks (core set)
tools.notes: Decode and non-destructive entry where applicable.

tools.name: Air wedge + long-reach / reach tools
tools.notes: Controlled gap for linkages / latches when policy allows.

tools.name: Borescope / slim inspection camera
tools.notes: See wafers, broken keys, anti-slam pins.

tools.name: Mechanical key duplicator (voltage or hand)
tools.notes: Standard edge-cut and many laser profiles.

tools.name: Dedicated laser / dimple key machine
tools.notes: High-security profiles your duplicator cannot cut.

tools.name: Bench vise with soft jaws
tools.notes: Hold heads and shells without marring.

tools.name: Deburr files + micrometer / slot gauge
tools.notes: Clean cuts and verify blade thickness.

tools.name: Ignition cylinder puller / press set
tools.notes: Remove stuck or broken ignitions where applicable.

tools.name: Inverter or portable power station
tools.notes: Run programmer and small machines on site.

tools.name: Jump pack / stable 12V maintain
tools.notes: Programming voltage stability on weak batteries.

scenarios.label: Transponder add / clone at vehicle
scenarios.tips: Confirm battery voltage before long writes. Match chip generation to vehicle immobiliser family.

scenarios.label: Duplicate mechanical blade on site
scenarios.tips: Some laser profiles need the laser machine — your duplicator may be a substitute only for overlapping blanks.

scenarios.label: Non-destructive lockout (policy-compliant)
scenarios.tips: Verify jurisdiction and client authorisation before entry tools.

scenarios.label: Smart key / proximity add or sync
scenarios.tips: Many smart-key jobs need both RF check and immobiliser programming steps.

scenarios.label: EEPROM / module read–write (workshop style on van)
scenarios.tips: Anti-static discipline and adapter fit are critical; confirm MCU family before power-on.
